meta.title: Testing Services
meta.description: Testing services for analytical chemistry, microbiology, and stability support to help teams release with confidence.

hero.title: Clear testing pathways for regulated products.

orientation.title: What this page covers
orientation.description: BioChroma Labs supports teams with practical testing programs that align with release timelines, quality goals, and regulatory expectations.
points: Analytical testing for identity, potency, and contamination risk
Microbiology testing for product safety and manufacturing hygiene
Stability support for shelf-life claims and storage decisions

serviceLines.title: Analytical Testing
serviceLines.subtitle: Identity, potency, and chemistry performance
serviceLines.description: Compendial and fit-for-purpose chemistry testing to verify materials and finished product quality.

serviceLines.title: Microbiology Testing
serviceLines.subtitle: Safety, contamination control, and release support
serviceLines.description: Risk-based microbiology programs that support batch release, quality investigations, and ongoing controls.

serviceLines.title: Stability Support
serviceLines.subtitle: Shelf-life confidence and lifecycle monitoring
serviceLines.description: Stability strategy and execution support to establish defensible expiry and storage decisions.
services: Protocol planning and pull schedule design
ICH climatic zone and photostability studies
Trend reporting for quality and regulatory review

customerFit.title: Who we support
segments: Founders and brand teams preparing first commercial launches
Manufacturers and operations leaders managing release timelines
QA/QC and regulatory teams preparing for audits and submissions

serviceAssurance.title: Defined scope and turnaround
serviceAssurance.description: Each engagement starts with a clear test scope, timelines, and reporting plan.

serviceAssurance.title: Regulatory-aligned reporting
serviceAssurance.description: Deliverables are structured to support partner review, audits, and filings.

serviceAssurance.title: Single technical point of contact
serviceAssurance.description: A designated lead coordinates updates, clarifications, and next steps.

relatedPathway.title: Need formulation or scale-up support?
relatedPathway.description: For concept, formulation, and commercialization planning, visit our dedicated Product Development pathway.
relatedPathway.label: Explore Product Development

cta.title: Need a testing plan for your next release?
cta.description: Share your matrix, timeline, and quality priorities. Our team will provide a scoped testing approach and next steps.
